title: City Overview
subtitle: Meridian Spire Municipal Map
desc: Whole-city tactical overview showing the sector layout, monorail loops, checkpoints, and major directional routes.

title: The Needle
subtitle: Executive Citadel / Central Spire Zone
desc: Central executive citadel built around the Obsidian Needle. Dense radial avenues, civic plazas, skybridges, and transit hubs.
connections: Gilded Crown, Midtier Ring, Skyports, The Wall, The Dregs, The Runoff

title: Gilded Crown
subtitle: Corporate Wealth / Elite Terrace District
desc: Ultra-luxury corporate wedge of terraces, sky gardens, embassy blocks, exchange halls, and polished supertowers.
connections: The Needle, Market Belt, Midtier Ring, Skyports, The Wall

title: Midtier Ring
subtitle: Residential / Commercial / Services Core
desc: The dense daily-life heart of Meridian Spire, packed with residences, workers, civic services, bazaars, and commuter lines.
connections: Gilded Crown, The Needle, Market Belt, BCI Complex, The Dregs

title: Market Belt
subtitle: Trade / Nightlife / Transit Arcades
desc: Gigantic commercial ring wrapped around the core, full of bazaars, exchange blocks, neon arcades, and 24/7 transit corridors.
connections: Gilded Crown, Midtier Ring, Forgebend, Drainways, The Dregs, The Runoff, Skyports

title: Drainways
subtitle: Flood Channels / Infrastructure Network
desc: Hydraulic infrastructure district of canals, locks, utility corridors, pump stations, and filtration basins that keep the city alive.
connections: The Needle, Market Belt, Forgebend, The Runoff

title: Forgebend
subtitle: Industrial Manufacturing / Labor Infrastructure
desc: Vast industrial sector of fabrication yards, smoke stacks, freight rails, machineworks, and worker housing.
connections: Market Belt, Drainways, Skyports, The Wall

title: The Dregs
subtitle: Overcrowded Slums / Survival Zone
desc: Dense survival district of stacked tenements, informal markets, salvage courts, alleys, and overcrowded transit nodes.
connections: Market Belt, Midtier Ring, The Runoff, The Wall

title: The Runoff
subtitle: Toxic Basin / Spillway District Included
desc: Toxic runoff basin below the city edge, including Runoff Gate, Blackwater Crossing, Leakside, South Pumps, and the Spillway District where the address is located.
connections: Drainways, The Dregs, The Wall, Southern Wastes

title: The Wall
subtitle: Perimeter Defense / Checkpoint Sector
desc: Curved defensive perimeter sector with checkpoints, bastions, watchtower arrays, cargo inspection yards, and wallside residential blocks.
connections: Gilded Crown, Forgebend, The Dregs, The Runoff, Skyports

title: Skyports
subtitle: Orbital Access / Air Traffic District
desc: Elevated sky-dock district of landing pads, customs concourses, cargo aprons, aerial routes, and orbital access infrastructure.
connections: Gilded Crown, The Needle, Forgebend, The Wall, Northern Reach
